opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I smashed my leg into the edge of the heavy oak table, and it immediately swelled up into a hard, painful lump.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I hit my thigh hard on a table 3 hours ago and it swelled up and is painful to move.

symptom_narrative.onset: 3 hours ago, blunt impact against a solid table edge
symptom_narrative.character: deep ache, focal firm swelling and bruising over the impact site on the front of the thigh
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the front of my right thigh
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant ache, worse with knee bending
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: red-purple bruise, skin intact; can still bear weight; NO numbness/tingling, no cold/pale foot
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: limping, painful to bend the knee

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; applied an ice pack before the consult

objective_data_offered.value: firm focal swelling ~6x5cm with a red-purple bruise over the front of the thigh, skin intact, visible on video
can still bear weight and walk with a limp; foot warm with normal feeling and movement
